zh-CN.title: 情绪命名
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当感受模糊、容易事后才明白时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天只做一件事：把一次情绪从“烦”改写成三个更具体的词。
zh-CN.script: 我现在不是单纯不舒服，我可能是失望、紧张和需要确认。

seven_day_plan.practice: 记录一次情绪触发点。
写下事实、感受、需要三栏。
把“还好”改成三个具体情绪词。
找一个低风险场景说出一个感受。
复盘一次没说出口的需要。
把一个情绪和身体感觉连接起来。
选择一个下周继续练的情绪词。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当感受模糊、容易事后才明白时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Emotion labeling
en.why_this_matters: Use when feelings are vague or only become clear afterward.
en.do_today: Today, turn one vague feeling into three more precise words.
en.script: I am not simply upset; I may be disappointed, tense, and needing clarity.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when feelings are vague or only become clear afterward.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 暂停与恢复
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你知道自己被触发，但很难立刻稳定时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天给自己设一个十秒暂停规则。
zh-CN.script: 我需要先停十秒，等我能更清楚地回应。

seven_day_plan.practice: 选一个暂停信号。
在一次小触发中练十秒呼吸。
写下暂停前后的不同。
给自己设一个延迟回复模板。
练习离开屏幕两分钟。
复盘一次因为暂停而避免升级的场景。
确定下周继续使用的暂停句。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你知道自己被触发，但很难立刻稳定时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Pause and recovery
en.why_this_matters: Use when you know you are triggered but cannot steady yourself immediately.
en.do_today: Set a ten-second pause rule today.
en.script: I need ten seconds so I can respond more clearly.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when you know you are triggered but cannot steady yourself immediately.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 反馈去压缩
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当反馈让你立刻紧张、防御或自我怀疑时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天把一次反馈拆成事实、评价和下一步。
zh-CN.script: 我先确认一下，你希望我具体调整哪一部分？

seven_day_plan.practice: 找一次近期反馈。
写出反馈里的事实。
写出你脑中自动冒出的解释。
问一个澄清问题。
把反馈转成一个行动。
记录反馈后的身体反应。
总结一个下次先问的问题。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当反馈让你立刻紧张、防御或自我怀疑时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Feedback decompression
en.why_this_matters: Use when feedback quickly creates tension, defensiveness, or self-doubt.
en.do_today: Today, split one piece of feedback into facts, evaluation, and next step.
en.script: Can I clarify which part you want me to adjust?

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when feedback quickly creates tension, defensiveness, or self-doubt.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 共情边界
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你理解别人后容易承担过多时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天练习一句“理解但不接管”的话。
zh-CN.script: 我理解这件事很难，我能帮你一起理清下一步，但不能替你承担全部。

seven_day_plan.practice: 识别一个你容易接管的场景。
写下对方责任和你责任的边界。
练习一句支持但不接管的话。
在一次对话中只提供一个具体帮助。
对一个请求说出可承担范围。
复盘说边界后的真实后果。
写下你的恢复动作。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你理解别人后容易承担过多时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Empathy with boundary
en.why_this_matters: Use when understanding others turns into carrying too much.
en.do_today: Practice one sentence that understands without taking over.
en.script: I understand this is difficult. I can help you sort the next step, but I cannot carry all of it for you.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when understanding others turns into carrying too much.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 冲突后修复
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当冲突后不知道如何重新开始时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天准备一句影响确认。
zh-CN.script: 刚才我的表达可能让你感觉被否定了，我想重新说一次。

seven_day_plan.practice: 回忆一个小误解。
写下你的意图和对方可能感受到的影响。
练一句影响确认。
补一句你的真实意图。
提出一个具体修复动作。
在安全关系中尝试一次。
复盘对方是否更愿意继续对话。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当冲突后不知道如何重新开始时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Repair after conflict
en.why_this_matters: Use when you do not know how to restart after conflict.
en.script: My wording may have felt dismissive. I want to try saying it again.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when you do not know how to restart after conflict.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 表达但不升级
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你很清楚自己的立场，但容易说得太硬时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天把一个强表达改成“事实 + 感受 + 请求”。
zh-CN.script: 当这个决定突然改变时，我有点措手不及。我想先确认接下来怎么协作。

seven_day_plan.practice: 写出一句原本想直接说的话。
删掉评价词，只留事实。
加上一个真实感受。
加上一个可回应请求。
读出来，检查语气。
找一个低风险场景使用。
复盘它是否降低了防御。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你很清楚自己的立场，但容易说得太硬时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Express without escalation
en.why_this_matters: Use when your position is clear but may land too sharply.
en.do_today: Turn one strong statement into fact + feeling + request.
en.script: When this decision changed suddenly, I felt caught off guard. I want to clarify how we work together next.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when your position is clear but may land too sharply.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 支持但不拯救
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你想帮人解决一切时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天先问对方需要倾听、建议还是行动帮助。
zh-CN.script: 你现在更需要我听你说，还是一起想一个下一步？

seven_day_plan.practice: 识别一次想立刻解决的冲动。
暂停并问支持方式。
只给一个帮助选项。
避免替对方做决定。
结束前确认对方自己的下一步。
记录你的承担感变化。
复盘支持和接管的差别。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你想帮人解决一切时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Support without rescuing
en.why_this_matters: Use when you feel pulled to solve everything for someone.
en.do_today: Ask whether the person wants listening, advice, or practical help.
en.script: Do you want me to listen, or would it help to think through one next step?

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when you feel pulled to solve everything for someone.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 从冷静到有温度
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你能解决问题但别人感觉没被回应时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天在给方案前先回应一句感受。
zh-CN.script: 我能理解这让你很挫败。我们可以一起看下一步怎么处理。

seven_day_plan.practice: 听到问题后先不急着给方案。
说出你听见的情绪。
确认对方是否认可。
再提出一个具体下一步。
观察对方反应是否软化。
复盘你是否少讲了道理。
保留一个适合你的温度句。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你能解决问题但别人感觉没被回应时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: From calm to warm response
en.why_this_matters: Use when you can solve the issue but others do not feel emotionally met.
en.do_today: Before offering a solution, acknowledge one feeling.
en.script: I can see how frustrating this is. We can look at the next step together.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when you can solve the issue but others do not feel emotionally met.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 关系能量管理
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你在多人关系或强情绪场景后感到累时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天给一段高互动之后安排十分钟低输入时间。
zh-CN.script: 我需要一点时间整理刚才的信息，之后我会回来回应。

seven_day_plan.practice: 标记今天最耗能的一次互动。
记录耗能来自人、情绪还是切换。
安排十分钟低输入恢复。
减少一个不必要回应。
练习结束对话的句子。
观察恢复前后差异。
设定下周一个关系能量边界。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你在多人关系或强情绪场景后感到累时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Relationship energy management
en.why_this_matters: Use when you feel drained after relationally intense situations.
en.do_today: Schedule ten minutes of low input after one high-interaction moment.
en.script: I need a little time to process what just happened, and I will come back to it.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when you feel drained after relationally intense situations.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 冲突降温
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当对话开始升级时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天练习把争执缩小到一个具体问题。
zh-CN.script: 我们先只谈一个点：现在最需要决定的是什么？

seven_day_plan.practice: 识别一个容易升级的话题。
写出双方各自想保护什么。
准备一句缩小问题的话。
练习放慢语速。
在对话中只问一个澄清问题。
结束后复盘是否降温。
保存一个下次可用的降温句。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当对话开始升级时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Conflict de-escalation
en.why_this_matters: Use when a conversation starts escalating.
en.do_today: Practice narrowing a disagreement to one concrete issue.
en.script: Let’s focus on one point: what needs to be decided right now?

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when a conversation starts escalating.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 重新连接自己
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当你总先照顾关系而忽略自己时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天在答应前先问自己：我是真愿意，还是怕关系变差？
zh-CN.script: 我想先想一下我真实能承担到哪里，再回复你。

seven_day_plan.practice: 记录一次你想立刻答应的场景。
写下真实愿意和勉强愿意的差别。
练习延迟回应。
说出一个较小的可承担范围。
观察关系是否真的受损。
记录一个被你忽略的感受。
设定一个下周的自我连接问题。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当你总先照顾关系而忽略自己时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Reconnect with self
en.why_this_matters: Use when you care for the relationship before checking yourself.
en.do_today: Before agreeing today, ask: am I willing, or am I afraid the relationship will change?
en.script: I want to check what I can realistically take on before I answer.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when you care for the relationship before checking yourself.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.

zh-CN.title: 复测前观察
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 当本次结果置信度较低时使用。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天不要急着定性，先记录作答时的状态。
zh-CN.script: 这次结果我先轻一点看，等状态更稳定时再复测。

seven_day_plan.practice: 记录作答时间和状态。
写下是否太快、太累或太分心。
挑三个最不确定的题目类型。
观察一天真实情绪场景。
不要做重大解释。
选择一个更稳定的复测时间。
复测后比较哪些部分稳定。

zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把练习做成自我批评；只观察一个小动作是否变得更清楚。
zh-CN.when_to_use: 当本次结果置信度较低时使用。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 行动处方是练习建议，不承诺改变结果或替代专业支持。

en.title: Reflection before retest
en.why_this_matters: Use when this result has lower interpretation confidence.
en.do_today: Do not label yourself today; first record the response context.
en.script: I will read this result lightly and retest when my context is steadier.

seven_day_plan.practice: Notice one relevant real situation.
Write the fact, feeling, and need separately.
Practice the key sentence once out loud.
Use the practice in a low-risk interaction.
Record what changed before and after.
Adjust the wording to sound natural.
Choose one version to keep using next week.

en.watch_out: Do not turn the practice into self-criticism; observe one small behavior becoming clearer.
en.when_to_use: Use when this result has lower interpretation confidence.
en.do_not_overread: An action prescription is a practice suggestion, not a promised outcome or substitute for qualified support.
